basics.name: Anirudh Jakhmola
basics.label: PhD Researcher | Phage Biology & Cryo-EM
basics.summary: PhD researcher at the University of Sheffield studying bacteriophages infecting Clostridioides difficile, with expertise in cryo-electron microscopy, bacterial genetics, and molecular cloning.

location.address: F11, Firth Court, School of Biosciences

work.name: Fagan Lab, University of Sheffield
work.summary: PhD research on bacteriophages infecting Clostridioides difficile.
highlights: Engineering C. difficile bacteriophages to combat gut infections
Using TEM, Cryo-EM, and structure-guided tools to understand phage structure and host interactions

work.name: Cellular Cytoskeletal Dynamics Lab, NISER
work.summary: Masters dissertation on bacterial cytoskeletal proteins.
highlights: Characterisation of bacterial ParM proteins in a heterologous system
Employed microscopy and FRAP techniques using DeltaVision and Leica microscopes for analysis of plasmid segregation proteins
Generated ATP-sensitive mutants of MreB protein and cloned them into a heterologous system

work.name: Max Planck Institute of Evolutionary Biology
highlights: Standardised the procedure for generating site-specific mutants of ΦX174 virus
Tested evolved ΦX174 viral lysates against E. coli C, K-12, E. coli B and other strains
Troubleshot the genotype of evolved ΦX174 phages

work.name: National Institute of Science Education and Research
highlights: Tested Drosophila trachea for apoptosis during larval stage transitions
Characterised eight proteins in Drosophila using western blotting and antibody staining
Reading project on six techniques for determining respiratory substrate usage

work.name: University of Sheffield
highlights: Taught 6 undergraduate courses across two academic years

work.name: SciAstra Education
highlights: Lead workshops and classes for various scientific courses
Managed 10+ team members across US, UK, EU, and India

volunteer.summary: Member of the Florey Institute Management Team.

volunteer.organization: PGR Core Committee, University of Sheffield

volunteer.summary: Managed audio for various institute functions.
Helped manage the official podcast of the institute.

highlights: MRC DiMeN Doctoral Training Partnership scholarship recipient
Supervised by Dr. Robert Fagan (Fagan Lab)

education.institution: HBNI: National Institute of Science Education and Research
highlights: DISHA Scholarship, Department of Atomic Energy

awards.title: SURE Project Grant
awards.summary: Secured funding to hire a student to work on C. difficile phage infection research.

awards.title: iGEM Synthetic Biology Gold Medal
awards.summary: Advisor for Phosphix team on engineering an enzyme for sustainable fertiliser production.

awards.title: MRC DiMeN DTP Scholarship
awards.summary: Funding awarded for at least four years for a PhD in the DiMeN Doctoral Training Partnership.

awards.title: DISHA Scholarship
awards.summary: Monthly scholarship and contingency grant to top 1% STEM students; held for five years (2018–2023).

awards.title: Educational Award
awards.summary: Merit-based award for excellent achievers in their senior year.

awards.title: DAV Merit Recognition
awards.summary: Merit-based award to encourage excellence at DAV Public School.

publications.name: A role for the C-terminal helix of the F plasmid segregating protein SopA in plasmid maintenance
publications.summary: Mishra, D., Jakhmola, A., Srinivasan, R. Plasmid (2022). DOI: 10.1016/j.plasmid.2022.102617
